hotels.name: Auberge Clermont
hotels.description_fr:

Les chambres climatis脙漏es, dont une suite nuptiale romantique, sont toutes d脙漏cor脙漏es diff脙漏remment, dans les couleurs et l'esprit de la Provence, et comprennent une salle de bains privative, le chauffage au sol ainsi qu'un ventilateur de plafond pour votre confort tout au long de l'ann脙漏e. Vous pourrez 脙漏galement s脙漏journer dans la villa ind脙漏pendante et historique de 3 chambres, aux int脙漏rieurs champ脙陋tres, qui offre une vue imprenable sur la grande terrasse couverte et la piscine priv脙漏e.
hotels.description_en:
Auberge Clermont is a stylish country guesthouse, located on a historic wine and fruit farm in the beautiful Franschhoek Valley. Surrounded by mountains and only 1 km from the quaint village centre, Auberge Clermont offers luxurious accommodation.
Auberge Clermont has en-suite rooms, including a romantic honeymoon suite. The units are individually decorated in the colours and moods of Provence. Underfloor heating, air-conditioning and ceiling fans ensure year round comfort. A historic, 3-bedroom self-catering Villa offers relaxing country lodgings with spectacular views from the large, covered terrace and private pool.
At the guesthouse, delicious country breakfasts are served under the 18th-century oak trees or in the charming courtyard dining room.
hotels.description_es:
El Auberge Clermont es un establecimiento rural elegante situado en una hist脙鲁rica granja de vino y frutas, en el hermoso valle de Franschhoek. El Auberge Clermont est脙隆 rodeado de monta脙卤as, a solo 1 km del pintoresco centro de la localidad, y ofrece alojamiento de lujo.
El Auberge Clermont dispone de habitaciones con ba脙卤o privado, incluyendo una rom脙隆ntica suite de luna de miel. Los alojamientos est脙隆n decorados de forma individual en tonos inspirados en la Provenza. Adem脙隆s, cuenta con calefacci脙鲁n radiante, aire acondicionado y ventiladores de techo. Esta villa independiente hist脙鲁rica de 3 dormitorios ofrece alojamiento rural relajante con vistas espectaculares desde la gran terraza cubierta y la piscina privada.
hotels.description_pt:
O Auberge Clermont 脙漏 um elegante alojamento rural, localizado num vinho hist脙鲁rico e quinta de frutas no belo Vale de Franschhoek. Rodeado por montanhas e apenas a 1 km do pitoresco centro da aldeia, o Auberge Clermont apresenta acomoda脙搂脙碌es luxuosas.
O Auberge Clermont tem quartos com casa de banho privativa, incluindo uma rom脙垄ntica suite de lua-de-mel. As unidades est脙拢o decoradas individualmente nas cores e ambientes da Proven脙搂a. O aquecimento de piso, o ar condicionado e ventiladores de tecto asseguram o conforto de todo o ano. Esta hist脙鲁rica villa auto-suficiente com 3 quartos disponibiliza relaxantes alojamentos de campo com vistas espectaculares a partir do amplo terra脙搂o coberto e da piscina privada.
hotels.description_it:
L'Auberge Clermont 脙篓 un'elegante struttura di campagna situata in un'antica azienda agricola con vino e frutta nella splendida valle di Franschhoek. Circondato dalle montagne, a soli 1 km dal pittoresco centro del paese, l'Auberge Clermont offre sistemazioni di lusso.
L'Auberge Clermont dispone di camere con bagno interno, tra cui una romantica suite luna di miele. Le sistemazioni sono decorate individualmente nei colori e nelle atmosfere della Provenza. Riscaldamento a pavimento, aria condizionata e ventilatori a soffitto garantiscono tutto l'anno comfort. Questa storica villa con 3 camere da letto offre un rilassante soggiorno in campagna e una vista spettacolare dalla grande terrazza coperta e dalla piscina privata.

Located in Franschhoek in the Western Cape Region, 200 metres from Patrysfontein Vo脙芦lpark (Bird Sanctuary), Fleur du Soleil features an outdoor pool, year-round outdoor pool and sun terrace. Free private parking is available on site.
Each room has a balcony or patio, and is fitted with a flat-screen TV. Some units have a seating area for your convenience. All rooms include a private bathroom. For your comfort, you will find bathrobes and free toiletries. Fleur du Soleil features free WiFi throughout the property.
There is a shared lounge at the property. A full cooked breakfast is provided and served within the suites.

Situato a Franschhoek, nella Provincia del Capo Occidentale, a 200 m dal Patrysfontein Vo脙芦lpark (Santuario degli Uccelli), il Fleur du Soleil offre una piscina all'aperto, una piscina all'aperto disponibile tutto l'anno e una terrazza solarium. Il parcheggio privato 脙篓 gratuito.

hotels.name: Akademie Street Boutique Hotel
hotels.description_fr:
L'脙漏tablissement Akademie Street Boutique Hotel est situ脙漏 au c脜鈥渦r de la vall脙漏e vinicole de Franschhoek, 脙聽 300 m脙篓tres du monument de Franschhoek. Il propose des suites luxueuses et des cottages traditionnels, dont certains sont dot脙漏s d'une piscine priv脙漏e.
Les h脙漏bergements sont entour脙漏s de jardins luxuriants. La plupart donnent sur les montagnes de Cape Winelands. Les suites et cottages arborent un th脙篓me personnalis脙漏. Vous appr脙漏cierez par ailleurs les jacuzzis chauff脙漏s au bois et les jardins paysagers parfum脙漏s.
Les b脙垄timents Gelatenhei, Oortuiging et Vreugde b脙漏n脙漏ficient chacun d'une piscine bien expos脙漏e et d'un jardin privatif ombrag脙漏. Le 4脙篓me b脙垄timent, Uitsig, comporte une grande suite de luxe s脙漏par脙漏e 脙聽 l'脙漏tage, qui dispose d'un balcon et d'une vue imprenable.
hotels.description_en:
Just 300 metres from the Franschhoek monument, in the heart of the Franschhoek Wine Valley, Akademie Street Boutique Hotel offers luxurious suites and traditional cottages, some with their own private swimming pools.
All of the accommodation at Akademie Street is set in lush gardens and many have views of the mountains of the Cape Winelands. Each suite or cottage has its own theme and the property boasts with wood fired hot tubs and fragrant landscaped gardens.
Gelatenheid Oortuiging and Vreugde each have their own sun-kissed swimming pool and shady, private garden. The fourth building, Uitsig is a separate, large, luxurious upstairs suite with balcony and lovely views. The fifth building, Twyfeling is a gracious Cape Dutch style house with large living rooms and two large bedroom suites.
hotels.description_es:

El Akademie Street Boutique Hotel se encuentra a solo 300 metros del monumento a Franschhoek, en pleno valle del vino de Franschhoek, y ofrece suites de lujo y casas de campo tradicionales, algunas con piscina privada.
Todas las suites y casas de campo del Akademie Street tienen una tem脙隆tica individual y est脙隆n ubicadas en jardines exuberantes. Muchas tienen vistas a las monta脙卤as y al cabo Winelands. Las casas Gelatenheid Oortuiging y Vreugde cuentan con piscina privada soleada y jard脙颅n privado con sombra.

All of the accommodation at Akademie Street is set in lush gardens and many have views of the mountains of the Cape Winelands. Each suite or cottage has its own theme and the property boasts with wood fired hot tubs and fragrant landscaped gardens.
Gelatenheid Oortuiging and Vreugde each have their own sun-kissed swimming pool and shady, private garden. The fourth building, Uitsig is a separate, large, luxurious upstairs suite with balcony and lovely views.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Akademie Street Boutique Hotel
Situato a soli 300 metri dal Monumento di Franschhoek, nel cuore della Valle del Vino di Franschhoek, l芒鈧劉Akademie Street Boutique Hotel offre suite lussuose e cottage tradizionali, alcuni con piscina privata.
Tutte le sistemazioni dell芒鈧劉Akademie Street sono immerse in rigogliosi giardini e molte regalano la vista sulle montagne di Cape Winelands. Ogni suite o cottage 脙篓 caratterizzata da un proprio tema e la struttura vanta vasche idromassaggio alimentate a legna e profumati giardini paesaggistici.
Gli alloggi Gelatenheid, Oortuiging e Vreugde dispongono ciascuno della propria piscina soleggiata e di un giardino privato ombreggiato.
